originalTitle: GameStop wants to buy back $2 billion of its own stock after an eBay-fueled selloff
summary: The videogame retailer also said that collectibles helped drive a 14% sales gain in the first quarter.
content: The videogame retailer also said that collectibles helped drive a 14% sales gain in the first quarter.
chineseTitle: 在 eBay 引发的抛售之后，GameStop 希望回购价值 20 亿美元的自有股票
chineseSummary: 这家视频游戏零售商还表示，收藏品帮助推动第一季度销售额增长 14%。
chineseContent: 这家视频游戏零售商还表示，收藏品帮助推动第一季度销售额增长 14%。
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于财经市场信号，适合用于观察利率、汇率、股债商品、金融机构和宏观政策变化。
